rag_rules: Place input envelope assumptions in component type annexes using only visible ports and provided bounds.
Use component type scope for assumptions and guarantees; avoid implementation-level bindings unless explicitly required.
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees must reference only visible, typed features declared in the AADL model.
Contract expressions must use scalar numeric values or explicit Boolean conditions derived from the model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Wrap all AGREE content in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Use `eq` to define helper boolean expressions for range checks before referencing them in guarantees.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not assume subcomponent ports or implementation bindings are visible in component type annexes.
